name: python3-autocommand
title: python3-autocommand
summary: library to generate argparse parsers from function signatures
description:
library to generate argparse parsers from function signatures
Autocommand is a library to automatically generate and run simple argparse
parsers from function signatures.
.
It turns a function into a command-line program, converting the function's
parameter signature into command-line arguments, and automatically running
the function with these arguments if the module was called as __main__.
Usage messages, invoked with -h or --help, are also created automatically.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-autocommand because library to generate argparse parsers from function signatures.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-autocommand as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-autocommand with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-autocommand --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
